understanding.inferredBusinessObjective: Plan a CRM for a local service business using the CRM product archetype.
understanding.targetUser: Owner or operator of a local service business.
successCriteria: Plan cites archetype-crm and uses CRM phases, modules, quality checklist, gates, and stop conditions.
Plan remains offline and plan-only with zero cost.
Plan includes explicit approval gates before any live service, credential, deployment, paid action, or production/customer data handling.
criticalUnknowns: Which local service niche and sales workflow should be modeled first?
assumptions: This run is proof of the offline AG OS intelligence loop only.
No real customer, production, credential, domain, or connector payload is available or allowed.
The CRM should start with local/repository records and no live integrations.
ownerConstraints: No live services, credentials, deployments, domain/DNS, paid tools, customer data, posting, outreach, phone/voice actions, n8n activation, Netlify activation, Lead Gen changes, AI Receptionist changes, Constitution changes, accepted lessons, permanent memory, or approval bypass.

rawCommand: Make me a CRM for a local service business.
plannedOutput: Plan-only command intake record for crm.
